overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Quick snapshot of what matters most. Use filters to narrow down; use the sidebar to dive deeper.

pains.title: Pains — Detail
pains.subtitle: Pain detail with distribution by module and status.
pains.byModule: Which modules have the most issues?
pains.byModuleDesc: Top modules by unique deals with at least one linked pain.
pains.dealStatus: Current deal status for deals with pain
pains.dealStatusSubtitle: Where in the funnel are deals with at least one detected pain?
pains.byOutcomeSubtitle: Which pains are associated with won vs lost deals? (minimum 5 closed deals)

faq.title: FAQs — Detail
faq.subtitle: FAQ detail to prioritize Battle Cards.
faq.byTopic: FAQs by Topic (unique deals with at least 1 question)

productIntelligence.title: Product Intelligence
productIntelligence.subtitle: Pains, sought modules and product gaps in the first demo.
productIntelligence.problemsDesc: Top pains by unique demos, broken down by theme and segment.
productIntelligence.modulesTitle: Which modules and features are they looking for?
productIntelligence.modulesDesc: Module co-occurrence with segments and feature gap detail.
productIntelligence.topGapsFreqDesc: Most requested missing features by unique deals.
productIntelligence.topGapsRevenue: Top 10 Feature Gaps — Revenue at Risk
productIntelligence.topGapsRevenueDesc: Features ranked by cumulative revenue of requesting deals.
productIntelligence.gapsPriorityDesc: Feature gap classification by prospect priority.
productIntelligence.drillPainsDesc: Select a pain to see the highest-confidence records.
productIntelligence.drillGapsDesc: Select a feature to see affected deals, sorted by amount.

salesEnablement.title: Sales Enablement
salesEnablement.frictionRankingDesc: Friction ranking by unique deals and narrative breakdown of the top two.
salesEnablement.frictionBySize: Does friction vary by company size?
salesEnablement.frictionByStage: At which deal stage does each friction appear?
salesEnablement.aeSupport: B. Which AEs need more support?
salesEnablement.aeSupportDesc: Sorted by average frictions per deal — the AE with the most complexity appears first.
salesEnablement.frictionByAe: What types of frictions does each AE face?
salesEnablement.battleCards: C. What do prospects ask? (Battle Cards)
salesEnablement.battleCardsDesc: Top 5 questions by topic, prioritized by frequency. Foundation for preparing answers before the next demo.

competitorAds.title: Competitor Ads
competitorAds.subtitle: What competitors are communicating in their ads (Meta Ad Library). On-demand analysis.
competitorAds.noAdsAdmin: Tap "Refresh" to fetch and analyze competitor ads.
competitorAds.noAdsUser: Ask an admin to run the first refresh.
competitorAds.painTooltip: Pain from our taxonomy this ad targets
competitorAds.creativeTooltip: Creative text/voice (OCR on image, transcription on video)
competitorAds.adLibraryLink: Open this ad in the Meta Ad Library

advisor.title: Campaign Advisor
advisor.description: Campaign angle generator using real pipeline and transcript data. Select filters for the first generation; then continue the conversation and translate the recommendation.
advisor.initPlaceholder: E.g.: How do we attack Enterprise in HISPAM this Q
examples: Best message for Mid Market in LatAm
Campaign angle for retail in Brazil

sqlChat.title: AI Chat
sqlChat.description: Answers about pains, gaps, competitors and deals using real demo and pipeline data. Modes: quantitative SQL, hybrid (quanti+quali), semantic search and chat.
sqlChat.inputPlaceholder: E.g.: Top 10 pains in Enterprise in the last 90 days
examples: Top 10 pains in Enterprise in the last 90 days
Revenue at stake by feature gap in HISPAM

glossary.title: Insights Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Types of insights the pipeline extracts and their meanings.
glossary.painDesc: The prospect describes a current frustration or operational need.
glossary.gapDesc: The prospect requests functionality that doesn't exist or isn't sufficient.
glossary.competitorDesc: A competitor is mentioned — they use it, are evaluating it, migrating, or discarded it.
glossary.frictionDesc: Something slowing or blocking commercial progress (budget, timing, decision-maker, etc.).
glossary.faqDesc: A prospect question about the product, process or pricing.

comparativeAnalysis.title: Comparative Analysis
comparativeAnalysis.subtitle: Compare periods or markets and choose which dimension to read: pains, gaps, competitors, modules, stages and more.

customDashboards.title: Custom Dashboards
customDashboards.subtitle: Build your own charts. Each dashboard can have multiple charts and is saved to your account.

regionalGtm.title: Regional / GTM
regionalGtm.sectionA: A. How much is each market worth?
regionalGtm.sectionADesc: Quick view of coverage and pipeline by region.
regionalGtm.sectionB: B. Where are we having the most conversations?
regionalGtm.sectionBDesc: Top 15 countries by insight count, broken down by type.
regionalGtm.sectionC: C. What are we finding in each market?
regionalGtm.topPainsByRegion: Top 3 Pains by Region (% of demos)
regionalGtm.competitorsByCountryDesc: Competitor ranking by country with mentions and main relationship detected.

executiveSummary.title: Executive Summary
executiveSummary.subtitle: Full picture of signals detected in the selected period.
executiveSummary.transcriptsCaption: Unique calls in the current filter.
executiveSummary.dealsMatchedCaption: Unique deals with at least one insight.
executiveSummary.revenueTotalCaption: Sum of amount per unique deal.
executiveSummary.compositionDesc: Volume of unique demos covered by industry, segment and country.
executiveSummary.signalSummaryDesc: Unique insights by type. A single demo may generate several.
executiveSummary.painsDesc: Top pains by unique demos, broken down by theme and module.
executiveSummary.modulesTitle: Which modules do they need and what's missing?
executiveSummary.modulesDesc: Module demand (pains + gaps combined) and gaps by frequency and revenue.

competitiveIntelligence.title: Competitive Intelligence
competitiveIntelligence.sectionA: A. Who are we competing against?
competitiveIntelligence.sectionADesc: Competitor ranking by unique deals, with relationship breakdown.
competitiveIntelligence.competitorRanking: Who do we compete against most often?
competitiveIntelligence.relationshipType: What is the prospect's relationship with the competitor?
competitiveIntelligence.sectionBDesc: Each competitor's presence by country, segment and industry.
competitiveIntelligence.byCountry: In which countries does each competitor appear?
competitiveIntelligence.bySegment: In which segment does each competitor appear?
competitiveIntelligence.byIndustry: In which industries does each competitor appear?
competitiveIntelligence.sectionC: C. At what deal stage do they appear?
competitiveIntelligence.sectionCDesc: Competitor × deal stage cross. If a competitor recurs in Lost stages, prioritize battle card.
competitiveIntelligence.byStage: At which deal stage does each competitor appear?
competitiveIntelligence.sectionDDesc: Deals where the prospect currently uses or is migrating from a direct competitor. Sorted by revenue descending.

productGaps.title: Product Gaps — Detail
productGaps.subtitle: Gap prioritization, revenue at risk, and signals by segment.
productGaps.inTaxonomyCaption: seeds previously defined by the team
productGaps.newFeaturesCaption: detected by the model · review to expand taxonomy
productGaps.topFeaturesDesc: Sorted by unique deals that mentioned the feature. Emoji indicates dominant priority.
productGaps.detailDesc: Filter by priority to isolate Dealbreakers. Red rows correspond to dealbreaker-type gaps.
